name: CARE Kutumba
description: Kutumba integration plugin for CARE. Enables integration with Karnataka's Kutumba family database system for patient identification and demographic data exchange.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Apps that connect CARE to external services.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_kutumba_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

mandatory.label: BPL tag UUID
mandatory.description: UUID of the instance level BPL/PHH tag

mandatory.label: APL tag UUID
mandatory.description: UUID of the instance level APL/NPHH tag

mandatory.label: Ration card number identifier UUID
mandatory.description: UUID of the instance level patient identifier: Ration card number

defaults.label: Auto-submit on fill
defaults.description: Auto-submit the patient registration form after filling from Kutumba. Set to "true" to enable.

optional.label: Health ID identifier UUID
optional.description: Optional, not used in production. UUID of the instance level patient identifier: Health ID number.

optional.label: Education ID identifier ID
optional.description: Optional, not used in production. UUID of the instance level patient identifier: Education ID number.

optional.label: Student (unverified) tag UUID
optional.description: Optional, not used in production. UUID of the instance level patient identifier: Student unverified.

optional.label: PWD (unverified) tag UUID
optional.description: Optional, not used in production. UUID of the instance level patient identifier: PWD unverified.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

standardConfigurations.title: Production
standardConfigurations.description: Production configuration for care_kutumba_fe with the minimum required environment variables.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
